# LLMs file for the Joshua Ynzon portfolio

site.title: Software Developer Portfolio
site.owner: Joshua Paulo Ynzon
site.description: Portfolio site for a software developer building reliable Laravel APIs, scalable Nuxt/Vue frontends, and international e-commerce operations.
site.url: /sitemap.xml

primary.sections:
  - hero
  - about
  - skills
  - journey
  - projects
  - contact

keywords: software developer, Laravel, Nuxt.js, Vue.js, RESTful APIs, MySQL, PostgreSQL, e-commerce operations, backend engineering, frontend delivery, full-stack portfolio.

featured.projects:
  - Global E-commerce Operations Platform
  - PassaQuiz
  - WealthMe
  - Quick Bites
